docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,407.65 FILED BY JANSEN, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT CREDIT AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANSEN, JERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CREDIT AMERICA $3,407.65 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,433.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY H.R. MAURISS-CREDIT AMERICA HEARING SET FOR AUG-02-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX AS TO ANDREW SCHULMAN O/C; NO POS ON FILE; ORIGINAL APPLICATION WAS NOT RETURNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY ANDREW SCHULMAN  FOR CREDIT AMERICA
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-02-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY H.R. MAURISS-CREDIT AMERICA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ANDREW SCHULMAN  FOR CREDIT AMERICA HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED RECEIPT SENT TO CREDIT AMERICA RETURNED SIGNED.
